footer_description: The easiest way to collect photos from your guests. Create a digital album for your special events without any app downloads.

errors.forbidden: This action is not allowed right now.
errors.packageLimitExceeded: This event has reached the new participant limit.
errors.contributorLimitReached: Event sharing limit is full. New participant uploads are not accepted.

gallery.title: Media Gallery
gallery.emptyText: Photos and videos shared by guests will appear here.

poster.title: Poster Designer
poster.subtitle: Create and customize your event poster for printing.

qr.title: QR Settings & Print
qr.subtitle: Customize your access point for guests.

logo.title: Custom Logo
logo.uploadSubtitle: PNG or SVG with transparent background works best.

theme.title: Design & Theme
theme.subtitle: Create a visual atmosphere that matches your celebration.
theme.uploadSubtitle: Natural scenery or event textures work best. Max 10MB.
theme.previewHeadline: Capturing Every Beat of the Celebration
theme.previewSubtext: Share your favorite photos and videos with everyone instantly.

settings.title: Event Settings
settings.subtitle: Set the basic information for your event guests.

generalDetails.title: General Details
generalDetails.description: Set the basic information for your event guests.
generalDetails.dateRejected: Date could not be saved. It may conflict with event constraints.
generalDetails.dateLockedAfterStart: Date cannot be changed after the event has started.
generalDetails.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Welcome to our digital album! We're so excited to celebrate with you.

privacy.title: Privacy & Access
privacy.description: Decide who can contribute and view the memories.
privacy.selfUploadsDesc: Enables the guests to see their own uploads.
privacy.removeUploadsDesc: Enables the guests to remove their own uploads.
privacy.multipleGuestbookDesc: Allows guests to post multiple guestbook entries.
privacy.publicTextGuestbook: Guests can see each other's text entries
privacy.publicTextGuestbookDesc: When enabled, guests can read text messages left by other guests.
privacy.publicAudioGuestbook: Guests can see each other's audio entries
privacy.publicAudioGuestbookDesc: When enabled, guests can listen to voice messages left by other guests.

advertorial.title: Advertising Area
advertorial.description: Choose a layout, upload ad images, and optionally add external links.
advertorial.disabled: This feature is not enabled for this event.
advertorial.layoutHint: Select No advertising to hide the advertising area on the guest page.

imageGuidance.none: No image is needed when advertising is hidden.
imageGuidance.single: Upload 1 landscape image in 16:9 ratio, for example 1600x900 px.
imageGuidance.1x1: Upload 1 landscape image in 16:9 ratio, for example 1600x900 px.
imageGuidance.2x1: Upload 2 landscape images side by side. Each image should be 16:9, for example 1600x900 px.
imageGuidance.1x2: Upload 2 landscape images stacked vertically. Each image should be 16:9, for example 1600x900 px.
imageGuidance.2x2: Upload 4 landscape images in a 2x2 grid. Each image should be 16:9, for example 1600x900 px.

errors.invalidImageType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image.
errors.missingImages: Please upload an image for every advertising cell.

export.title: Export Event
export.description: Export your event data into an archive.
export.exportQueued: Your export is queued and will be started soon.

removeData.title: Remove My Data
removeData.description: Doing this will permanently erase your user and event information.
removeData.confirmMessage: Action remove user data is irreversible. Are you sure you want to proceed?
removeData.completeMessage: Thank you for using our service. Your data has been permanently erased.

collaborators.title: Event Collaborators
collaborators.inviteNote: An invitation link will be sent to their email instantly.
collaborators.invitePopupDescription: The invitation link has been delivered to the recipient.

trash.title: Trash
trash.emptyText: Items you delete will appear here for 30 days before being permanently removed.

guestbook.title: Guestbook
guestbook.searchPlaceholder: Search by guest name or content...
guestbook.emptyText: Guest messages and voice notes will appear here.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.description: Let's start by setting up general information about your event.

eventStartingSoon.title: Event Starting Soon
eventStartingSoon.description: You will not be able to edit the start date after the event has started.

eventEnded.title: Event Has Ended
eventEnded.description: Download your data before it expires. There will be a two-day grace period before it is permanently deleted.

qrPreview.title: Live Preview
qrPreview.linkActive: Link is active and ready to share

guestAccess.title: Instant Guest Access
guestAccess.description: Share this link with your guests to start collecting moments.

latestMemories.title: Latest Memories
latestMemories.photosWillAppear: Photos uploaded by your guests will appear here

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Perfect for intimate gatherings and private parties.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: The ideal choice for weddings and larger celebrations.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: Premium experience for corporate events and gala dinners.

qrKit.name: Custom QR Kits
qrKit.description: Professionally designed digital assets tailored to your theme and logo for branding consistency.
qrKit.instruction:
Pick your icon, colors and draw method for your QR code. For best results: Icon image is a square with no padding and the icon is centered.
Test your qr code after editing.
Colors have contrast between them.

audioGuestbook.name: Audio Guestbook
audioGuestbook.description: A unique physical addition to collect heartfelt voice messages from your loved ones.
audioGuestbook.instruction:
Guests now can leave voice messages through your event page.
Place a sign near the QR code to let guests know they can record audio messages.
Recordings appear in your gallery alongside photos and can be downloaded anytime.

printedBanner.name: QR Card
printedBanner.description: High-quality 10x15cm QR cards linked to your event that you place in your event area. Your guests only scan and upload.
printedBanner.instruction: Please write down your address. A personnel will email you about further details. You will receive a tracking number to your email.

welcome_board.name: Welcome Board
welcome_board.description: A beautifully printed welcome board featuring your event name and QR code — perfect for greeting guests at the entrance.
welcome_board.instruction: Please provide your delivery address. Our team will be in touch with further details. A tracking number will be sent to your email once dispatched.

easel.name: Easel
easel.instruction: Please provide your delivery address. Our team will be in touch with further details. A tracking number will be sent to your email once dispatched.

paywall.corePackagesSubtitle: The essential foundation for your digital memories.
paywall.heroSubtitle: Elevate your special moments with our premium digital gallery and custom physical event assets.
paywall.addOnsSubtitle: Enhance your experience with these modular extras.

guest.addMomentsDesc: Upload your photos and videos to the live gallery. No registration required.
guest.noMemoriesYet: No memories yet. Be the first to share!

guestGuestbook.capturingMoments: Capturing the moments that matter most.
guestGuestbook.noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Be the first to leave a note!
guestGuestbook.audioSent: Your voice message has been sent!
guestGuestbook.nameRequired: Please enter your name before submitting.

guestUploads.uploadsDesc: A collection of moments you've captured and shared. These memories are now part of their beautiful story.
guestUploads.startSharing: Start sharing your memories with the event.

auth.createAccountSubtitle: Start capturing your most beautiful moments.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.mustAgreeToTerms: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.inviteRequiredDesc: Sign up requires an invite link. If you already have an account, please sign in.
auth.invalidInviteLinkDesc: This invite link is invalid or has expired.

checkout.emailInfo: Your account information and access links will arrive via this email immediately after purchase.

extendStorage.modalTitle: Your event will be deleted in 14 days
extendStorage.modalMessage: After the storage period ends, the event and all of its data will be removed from the system. You can extend it for one more month using the button below. NOTE: Extension is a one-time only option.
extendStorage.toastAlreadyExtended: This event has already been extended
extendStorage.toastRejected: Extension failed (the period may have expired)
extendStorage.toastForbidden: You don't have permission to extend this event
extendStorage.toastUnknown: Something went wrong, please try again
